message:
refactor(node): restructure main.rs to import from lib crate instead of declaring modules inline

Move module declarations out of main.rs and import public types from
the frankenengine_node library crate instead. This eliminates the
duplicate module tree between lib.rs and main.rs, ensuring the binary
crate delegates to the library crate as the single source of truth for
module structure.

- Remove 27 inline mod declarations (api, claims, cli, config, etc.)
- Replace with structured use imports from frankenengine_node::*
- Bring specific types into scope for CLI dispatch (BenchCommand,
  FleetCommand, IncidentCommand, MigrateCommand, etc.)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
